_provenance: Mock domain for the standalone benchmark, modeled on agentic-crm's product shape (db/schema.sql + laferia mattress attributes). Fictional store, fictional products, ARS prices. A real deployment swaps this file for the merchant's live catalog — the renderer contract stays identical.
